settings.ggLYsXb6I8W_text:
STEP 1 
Purchase a product from the SOME BY MI Galactomyces line between March 6 and April 6.

STEP 2

Try and use it.

STEP 3

Share your experience before Wednesday April 30, 22:59 GMT by leaving a review on the product page of your product. Your review must be honest, genuine, informative and helpful for other KS customers.

STEP 4

Leave your order number in your review! (example: #KS-817356)
STEP 5

Your personal Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit code will be sent by May 5.

STEP 6

Add the Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit to your cart on your next KS order and use the code to get it for free.

settings.ggap9Rfg5DI_text: With its Galactomyces Pure Vitamin C Glow Serum (10ml) and Galactomyces Glutathione Brightening Cream (10ml), it's the ultimate duo for a deeply hydrated, smooth skin with a radiant glow!

settings.gg20UEDzLfu_text:
1. Only reviews submitted on the product pages for the SOME BY MI Galactomyces Pure Vitamin C Glow Toner, Galactomyces Pure Vitamin C Glow Serum, Galactomyces Glutathione Glow Milky Toner, Galactomyces Glutathione Daily Mask, Galactomyces Glutathione Glow Serum Mask, and Galactomyces Glutathione Brightening Cream will be included.

2. Only orders of the SOME BY MI Galactomyces line placed between March 6 and April 6 will be included.

3. The KS order number (example: #KS-897274) must be included in the review.

4. The KS Team reserves the right to exclude reviews that do not meet the required standards.

5. Reviews submitted after Wednesday April 30, 22:59 GMT, will be excluded.

6. Once a review has been submitted and approved, the KS team will send your personal Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit code via email by May 5.

7. One Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit code will be issued per order, not per review.

8. The Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit codes are valid for 6 months.

9. The Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit code cannot be combined with other discount codes.

10. Do not apply if you live outside of Korean Skincare's shipping range (EU/UK/US). 

11. The Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit can only be obtained by placing a KS order.

12. The Galactomyces Brightening Trial Kit is non-refundable.
settings.ggMQKR0baBN_text: SOME BY MI Review Event: Terms & Conditions
